product_overview: Cloud Portfolio is a high-performance personal portfolio website showcasing projects, skills, and background with premium animations and smooth scrolling. It focuses on responsive design, lazy-loaded routes, and resilience via an application-wide error boundary.
core_goals: Deliver a lightweight, fast-loading personal portfolio with smooth animations and high perceived performance
Showcase projects and professional background with clear navigation and accessible layouts across devices
Provide robust UX: custom cursor and smooth scrolling for polish, lazy loading and preloading for speed, and an ErrorBoundary to prevent crashes

features.name: Home (Landing) Page
features.description: Primary landing experience with hero section and entry points to About and Projects sections.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See hero section with headline and primary CTA -> Click primary CTA -> Navigate to /search -> See About-style content
Navigate to / -> See hero section -> Click Projects link -> Navigate to /candidates -> See projects list or placeholders
Navigate to / -> See hero section -> Click an internal link to a lazily-loaded section -> Section fails to load due to network error -> See inline error message and Retry button

features.name: Custom Cursor
features.description: A visually distinctive cursor that changes state over interactive elements without blocking clicks.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See custom cursor overlay active -> Move cursor over an interactive card -> Cursor changes state to indicate interactivity -> Click card -> Card's action executes

Navigate to / -> See custom cursor overlay active -> Move cursor quickly across screen -> Custom cursor does not update due to render glitch -> Default system cursor is visible -> Click card -> Card's action still executes

features.name: Smooth Scrolling (Lenis)
features.description: Smooth, physics-based scrolling providing premium feel while preserving anchor link behavior and accessibility.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll down with mouse wheel -> Smooth scrolling animates content flow -> Click an anchor link -> Page scrolls smoothly to anchor
Navigate to / on mobile viewport -> Scroll down -> Scrolling stutters due to low device resources -> Fallback to native scrolling engages and content remains accessible

features.name: Error Boundary
features.description: Global ErrorBoundary that catches rendering errors and shows a friendly recovery UI without crashing the entire app.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Trigger a simulated rendering error in a component (dev/test) -> ErrorBoundary displays friendly error UI with message and Reload button -> Click Reload -> App reloads to /
Navigate to /search -> Component throws during render in production -> ErrorBoundary displays fallback with minimal details -> User cannot access that section and sees contact or retry options

features.name: Performance Optimization (Lazy loading & Preload)
features.description: Routes and heavy components are lazy-loaded with critical routes preloaded after a short idle delay to improve time-to-interactive.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Initial route renders quickly -> Background preloading starts after idle -> Preload /search and /candidates -> Click Projects link -> /candidates loads quickly from cache
Navigate to / on a slow network -> Lazy-loaded route module fails to fetch -> Show skeleton loader and a friendly load error -> User clicks Retry -> Module attempts to load again

features.name: Responsive Design
features.description: Mobile-first layouts implemented with Tailwind CSS ensuring stable, accessible layouts across viewport sizes.
user_flows: Open the app in mobile viewport -> Navigate to / -> Layout uses single-column stack and readable typography -> Open main menu -> Tap About link -> Navigate to /search -> Content displays in mobile layout
Open the app in a very small viewport -> Navigate to / -> Complex animation causes layout shift -> Fallback simplified layout appears to preserve readability -> User can still access nav toggles

features.name: User Authentication (Supabase Email Auth)
features.description: Email/password sign up and login backed by Supabase; successful auth redirects to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login/Signup button -> Redirects to dashboard at /
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with invalid email -> Fill password input field -> Click Login/Signup button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Search and Discover (AI lead discovery)
features.description: Search page for discovery with AI intent, filters and batch draft generation; supports selecting results into a pipeline.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Type search queries in input box -> Toggle advanced search filters (Company Size, Revenue, Tech Stack) -> Click Scan button -> View list of results -> Select multiple results and add to pipeline
Navigate to /search -> Type search queries in input box -> Click Scan button -> API returns an error or empty set -> See empty state or error message with guidance to refine query

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: Overview dashboard presenting metrics, background task progress, and quick links into leads or drafts.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View stats summary with key metrics -> View progress bar of background tasks -> Click link to leads -> Navigate to /candidates -> See saved candidates and drafts pipeline
Navigate to / -> Attempt to load /api/stats -> API call fails -> See placeholder stats with retry option and explanation that metrics are temporarily unavailable

routes.description: AI lead discovery and search page

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and sign up using Supabase Email auth
user_interactions: See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Search and Discover Leads
features.description: Find candidates using AI intent and filters
user_interactions: Type search queries in input box
Toggle advanced search filters (Company Size, Revenue, Tech Stack)
Select multiple results and add to pipeline

features.name: Dashboard Stats
features.description: View overall metrics and generated drafts
user_interactions: View progress bar of background tasks
